name: Usheera (Vetiver)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Pitta and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: The ultimate cooling herb for summer and fevers.
Treats urinary tract infections and burning urination.
Calms the mind and reduces anxiety.
plantProfile: Fragrant roots used in perfumes and cooling mats.
